arts.ttl: Preview: FC Utrecht vs. Heerenveen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between FC Utrecht and Heerenveen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Utrecht are at a critical juncture in their pursuit of a spot in next season's Champions League qualifiers as they prepare for their match against Heerenveen this Sunday at Stadion Galgenwaard. Heeren...
